category_sources: Official homepage says bas55 implements Minimal BASIC and provides an interpreter and editor.
source_facts.description says bas55 is a Minimal BASIC interpreter as defined by ECMA-55.
docs_sources: Official homepage links an online manual at https://jorgicor.niobe.org/bas55/bas55.html.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README links back to the bas55 home page.
Official homepage says to browse the source repository at https://github.com/jorgicor/bas55.
tags_sources: Official manual says bas55 provides an interpreter and editor.
source_facts.description identifies BASIC, ECMA-55, and interpreter role.
